root_cause.description: The validate_jwt_token function in auth/utils.py uses a hardcoded 'WRONG_SECRET_KEY_FOR_TESTING' instead of the global SECRET_KEY, causing all token validations to fail.

learning_objectives: Recognize the importance of consistent configuration usage

hints.text: Login works, but the resulting token is rejected by other endpoints. This suggests a mismatch in how tokens are handled.
Compare generate_jwt_token and validate_jwt_token in auth/utils.py. Are they using the same key to process the token?
